seo.title: How Long Do Windows Last? Lifespan Guide [2026] | Deluxe
seo.description: Most windows last 15 to 30 years, depending on material, climate and maintenance. Learn the warning signs that your Bay Area windows need replacement.

faq.question: What is the main takeaway from “How Long Do Windows Last”?
faq.answer: Most windows last 15 to 30 years, depending on material, climate and maintenance. Learn the warning signs that your Bay Area windows need replacement.

faq.question: How should a Bay Area homeowner apply the advice in “How Long Do Windows Last”?
faq.answer: Use the guidance in “How Long Do Windows Last” as a starting point, then account for the home's age, openings, exposure, existing damage, comfort goals, and budget before selecting a solution.

faq.question: Does “How Long Do Windows Last” apply to every window or door project?
faq.answer: No. The considerations in “How Long Do Windows Last” can change with frame material, product condition, installation method, local code, and the surrounding wall or waterproofing.

faq.question: When should I request professional help after reading “How Long Do Windows Last”?
faq.answer: Request an evaluation when the issue described in “How Long Do Windows Last” involves safety, water intrusion, damaged framing, uncertain measurements, code requirements, or a full replacement decision.
